summary: Fixed all 5 items. (1) User bubble width cap: replaced Tailwind max-w-[85%] with inline style max-width: min(85%, 68ch) so bubbles never exceed 68 characters wide on large screens. (2) TurnDiffSummary: already wired in MessageBubble.tsx (lines 628-636) from prior work — no changes needed, verified working. (3) CompactionDivider: already wired in MessageList.tsx (lines 173-175) with compaction-pre dimming on prior messages — no changes needed, verified working. (4) Code block copy button: already always-visible in code-header bar via .code-copy-btn CSS (lines 1085-1103 of index.css) with hover enhancement — no changes needed, verified working. (5) Message spacing: added isRoleSwitch prop to MessageRow (mt-[4px] for same-role = 16px total with density-py, mt-3 for role-switch = 24px total), computed isRoleSwitch() in MessageList For loop by comparing each message role to its predecessor.

2_turn_diff_summary.notes: TurnDiffSummary imported and rendered at lines 628-636 in MessageBubble. Shows after completed assistant messages with tool calls. Collapsible with 5-block DiffBar. No changes needed.

3_compaction_divider.notes: CompactionDivider rendered at lines 173-175 before messages at compactionIndex boundary. compaction-pre CSS class dims prior messages at 50% opacity. No changes needed.

4_code_block_copy_button.notes: Copy button injected in code-header bar for every fenced code block. Always visible (not opacity-0 by default). Has hover state with border and background. copy-pop animation on success. No changes needed.

5_message_spacing_consistency.change: Added isRoleSwitch?: boolean prop to MessageRowProps. classList applies mt-[4px] (same-role: 6+4+6=16px total) or mt-3 (role-switch: 6+12+6=24px total). MessageList computes isRoleSwitch() by comparing each message role to its predecessor in visibleMessages().
